args:
set -eu
plan_json=$(mktemp)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- plan --format json --cache-namespace flashinfer-autotune-cache --readiness correctness > "$plan_json"
grep -q '"name":"kv_cache_update"' "$plan_json"
if grep -q 'prefill_attention' "$plan_json"; then
  echo 'unexpected prefill scope in cache-scoped plan' >&2
  exit 1
fi
printf 'cache-scoped-plan\n'
